title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 630.186 - Purchase of food limited to that for use of patients
text:
630.186.  Purchase of food limited to that for use of patients. — Any purchase of food in any institution under the control of the department, other than the usual quantity purchased for the patients or residents thereof, to be used by or for anyone other than the patients or residents of such institution shall be charged directly to the individual responsible for such purchase.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1724)
